creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Submitter is committer, assign to him.

Attachment #245620 is LGTM for ports from my part.

However, I stronlgy recommend not removing the .orig files or if you do, to remove them in a later stage (e.g. pre-configure or pre-build).  This would make it possible to use "make makepatch" after having previously run "make patch".
